ERROR_LICENSE_CHART_STATUS_AND_FORBIDDEN: A license cannot be a License Chart and forbidden
TABLE_LICENSE_CHART_STATUS_TOOLTIP: only licenses with status „license chart“ are approved for usage
COL_LICENSE_TEXT_SIMILARITY_TOOLTIP: indicates how identical the license texts are
COL_LICENSE_FAMILY_TOOLTIP: relevant for policies, also known as allow & deny lists, related to software distribution use cases
COL_LICENSE_SOURCE_TOOLTIP: describes whether a license is originating from spdx database or a custom-created entry
COL_APPROVAL_STATUS_TOOLTIP: describes the status if a license is reviewed and generally allowable: applicable policies such as allow & deny lists to be considered
COL_LICENSE_TYPE_TOOLTIP: specifies the category of a license entry
TAB_TITLE_EVALUATION_TOOLTIP: if available, contains the automatically converted content of an archived Word document
TAB_TITLE_LEGALCOMMENTS_TOOLTIP: internal explanations on license interpretation and examples
TAB_TITLE_ALIASES_TOOLTIP: other unique identifiers the license is known under
NO_COMMENT: No license-specific comments available at the moment.
FIncludeCopyRight: Include copyright notice in all copies or substantial portions of software
FIncludePermission: Include permission notice (license text) in all copies or substantial portions of software
FSCProvideOffer: Provide an offer to Source Code
FSCKeepCopyAvail: Keep a copy of Source Code available for request
FSCLicenseMBSame: License Code under the same license terms

SR_MISSING_COPYRIGHT_DESCRIPTION: Copyright information is missing; the warn level varies depending on the risk level of distribution. It is required to ascertain and provide this information in an updated SBOM delivery. Copyright information can typically be found on the license text of a component, within the project’s readme file, or written as code header in the main source code files.
SR_MISSING_LICENSE_DESCRIPTION: License text is missing. Without the license text of a custom license, you cannot check if the text compares to the custom license text stored in the FOSS License Database for the respective license identifier or alias. It is required to properly identify the custom license text and provide this information in an updated SBOM delivery.
SR_MALFORMED_COPYRIGHT_DESCRIPTION: Copyright information contains special or unexpected characters. It is recommended to check this specific copyright information. In case it is malformed please check with the development team to correct this information and provide it in an updated SBOM delivery.
SR_COPYRIGHT_TO_LONG_DESCRIPTION: Copyright information is unusually lengthy. It is recommended to check this specific copyright information. In case it is malformed this information needs to be corrected and provided in an updated SBOM delivery.
SR_ALIASING_USED_DESCRIPTION: A license alias was used for this component
SR_LICENSES_DIFF_DESCRIPTION: License Declared and License Concluded differs. It is required to check the components original source, identify the reason for this difference and confirm this difference is acceptable.
QT_GENERAL_REMARKS: [Here you can insert the general remarks...]
SR_MISSING_LICENSE_ID_DESCRIPTION: The license identifier is missing. It is required to properly identify the component license and provide this information in an updated SBOM delivery.
SR_MISSING_NAME_DESCRIPTION: Component name is missing. Therefore, the component cannot be properly handled. It is required to properly identify the component name and provide this information in an updated SBOM delivery.
SR_UNMATCHED_LICENSE_USED_DESCRIPTION: License can't be matched with a policy rule
SR_UNKNOWN_LICENSE_USED_DESCRIPTION: License is unknown. Such cases have to be resolved. If no license information at all is present for a component (like NONE, empty or NOASSERTION), the use is forbidden; in this case it is required to ascertain the license information. If the license information is present, but the license has not yet been reviewed by the company legal team, the project owner can request a license review.
LIC_LICENSE_CLASSIFICATION: Classification of specific license terms is generalized and simplified and cannot replace a detailed analysis of a license.

DLG_CLONE_PROJECT_COUNT_HINT: Enter the number of clones to create (1-10)
DLG_CLONE_PROJECT_COUNT_INTEGER: Number must be a whole number
ERROR_VALIDATION_LICENSE_ID_IS_NOT_VALID: License ID is not valid (no blank, special characters and must be between 2 and 384 characters)
WIZARD_target_enterprise_description: Software to support our business processes.
WIZARD_target_mobile_description: Apps provided for smartphone and tablets.
WIZARD_target_vehicle_description: Onboard software, apps, dynamic contents, and offboard backends.
WIZARD_target_other_description: Choose this most restrictive option if nothing else matches to your case.
WIZARD_page_target_platform_hint: Please select your project's target platform
WIZARD_page_architecture_hint: Please select your project's architectural scope
WIZARD_target_users_internal_description: The software is only used by your legal entity without further distribution.
WIZARD_target_users_MB_description: The software is used within the company Group.
WIZARD_target_users_external_description: The software is used by external users, e.g. end customers or suppliers.
NEW_WIZARD_TARGET_USERS_MB_DESC: This software is used within company
NEW_WIZARD_TARGET_USERS_MB_HELP: Choose “Company” if the target users are from within company.
NEW_WIZARD_TARGET_USERS_BUSINESS_DESC: This software is used by external Business Partners e.g. suppliers
NEW_WIZARD_TARGET_USERS_BUSINESS_HELP: Choose “Business Partner” if the target users are third parties with whom we collaborate. Typically, this means suppliers, independent retailers or other business to business relationships.
NEW_WIZARD_TARGET_USERS_CUSTOMER_DESC: This software is used by end consumers
NEW_WIZARD_TARGET_USERS_CUSTOMER_HELP: Choose “End Customers” if the target users are end consumers.
WIZARD_architecture_frontend_description: Frontend for software running in a frontend, like a browser, mobile app or client.
WIZARD_architecture_backend_description: Backend for software running only on a backend server.
WIZARD_vehicle_architecture_onboard_desc: Software, apps and dynamic contents which are used inside the product.
WIZARD_vehicle_architecture_offboard_des: Backend systems which are connected to the product.
WIZARD_architecture_mixed_description: The software being distributed includes both frontend and backend, like a stand-alone application.
WIZARD_page_distribution_target_hint: Please select your project's distribution target
WIZARD_distribution_target_internal_desc: The software is kept in a place of your responsibility, for example in the on-premise hybrid cloud.
WIZARD_distribution_target_MB_or_externa: The software is distributed outside your legal entity, e.g. to another legal entity or an external company.
NEW_WIZARD_DISTRIBUTION_TARGET_MB_DESC: The (backend) software is kept within the responsibility of company
NEW_WIZARD_DISTRIBUTION_TARGET_MB_HELP: Choose "Company" as distribution target if your (backend) software is only deployed within company, without distribution of code or binaries outside of company. If you have chosen "Frontend or Client " in the architecture, then it is automatically assumed that the Target Users equals the Distribution Target
NEW_WIZARD_DISTRIBUTION_TARGET_BUSINESS_: The (backend) software is distributed outside of company, e.g. to an external company

Choose "Business Partner" as distribution target if your (backend) software is distributed outside of company. That means the external business partner decides on which infrastructure the software runs. If you have chosen "Frontend or Client " in the architecture, then the Target Users are automatically assessed as the Distribution Target

SR_MISSING_VERSION_DESCRIPTION: Component Version is missing. Therefore, the component cannot be exactly identified. It is required to properly identify the component version and provide this information in an updated SBOM delivery.
SR_TOO_MUCH_OR: The license expression contains an unusually large number of licenses to choose from (OR). It is required to carefully review license expressions of this kind for correctness to avoid legal risk. It is recommended to check the components original source.
SR_CONTAINS_COMPLEX: SBOM contains unusual content which cannot be processed properly: Complex logical license expressions; Currently only AND-expressions and OR-expressions are handled, but not combinations thereof.
SR_CONTAINS_WITH: SBOM contains unusual content which cannot be processed properly: License expression with license exception; Currently only specific combinations of licenses and exceptions are handled with a specific custom license identifier, but not arbitrary combinations of licenses and exceptions.
SR_CONTAINS_BADCHARS: SBOM contains unusual content which cannot be processed properly: License name contains bad characters.
SR_CONTAINS_SNIPPET: SBOM contains unusual content which cannot be processed properly: Snippet items.
SR_CONTAINS_ANNOTATIONS: SBOM contains unusual content which cannot be processed properly: Annotations.
SR_CONTAINS_EXTERNALREFS: SBOM contains unusual content which cannot be processed properly: External references.

HELP_USER_TYPE_Owner: The owner creates and manages the project, its metadata and its project channels (also known as versions), can grant other users access to the project, and is also able to create, refresh or revoke API tokens; the owner also has privilege to view, upload and download data from the project. Furthermore, the owner is able to request checks and approvals on the project.
HELP_USER_TYPE_Supplier: The supplier creates and manages project channels (also known as versions) and is also able to create, refresh or revoke API tokens; the supplier also has privilege to view, upload and download data from the project.
HELP_USER_TYPE_Viewer: A viewer has privilege to view and download data from the project.

SR_PROJECT_ADDRESS_DESCRIPTION: The contact address in the project settings for display in the third party notice is missing. It is required to set a custom address in the project settings, or the project owner needs to make sure that the default contact address fits with the local guidelines for disclosure.
TT_TRANSLATE_IN_SEPARATE_TAB: Open internal machine translation service to get a legally non-binding translation for better understanding. Only the English version is official!
POLICY_RULES_DISCLAIMER: If you are presented with a choice of licenses, use the most permissive license (if possible, also the most commonly known one). If you really must (e.g. to resolve a license compatibility issue), use a copyleft license. In any case, only use licenses with license charts.
VERSION_IN_APPROVAL: The Channel has been subject to an approval, review request, Status review or contains an SBOM marked for retention. Therefore, the Channel cannot be deleted.
PROJECT_IN_APPROVAL: The Project has been subject to an approval or/and review request. Or one of the Channels has been subject to an approval, review request, Status review or contains an SBOM marked for retention. Therefore, the Project cannot be deleted.
PROJECT_IN_APPROVAL_DEPRECATION: The Project has been subject to an approval or/and review request. Or one of the Channels has been subject to an approval, review request, Status review or contains an SBOM marked for retention. Therefore, the Project cannot be deleted. Instead, it can be deprecated.
PROJECT_DEPRECATION_UNREVERTABLE: This action cannot be reverted. The project will be marked as DEPRECATED and cannot be used anymore.
PROJECT_DEPRECATION_UNREVERTABLE_CONFIRM: I confirm that I want to deprecate the project and that I am aware that this action cannot be reverted.
PR_DEPRECATION_UNREVERTABLE: This action cannot be reverted. The policy rule will be marked as DEPRECATED and cannot be used anymore.
PR_DEPRECATION_UNREVERTABLE_CONFIRM: I confirm that I want to deprecate the policy rule and that I am aware that this action cannot be reverted.
LICENSE_IN_USE_BY_POLICY_RULES: License is in use by {count} policy rule(s)
OBLIGATION_IN_USE_BY_LICENSES: Obligation is in use by {count} license(s)
DELEGATE_TASK_DESCRIPTION: Select a user to delegate this task to:
TT_WIZARD_TP_ENTERPRISE_IT: Choose  "Enterprise IT " if your software supports our business processes. This includes internal applications, applications for retailers as well as web-based applications, or public applications like websites.
TT_WIZARD_TP_MOBILE: Choose  "Mobile " if your application will be distributed to mobile devices like smartphones, tablets, smartwatches and the like. Also choose this option for backend systems which are connected to the mobile app.
TT_WIZARD_TP_VEHICLE: Choose  "Product " if your software will be distributed Product Onboard, or on Product Offboard backend systems which are connected to the product. The option applies settings for production-material.
TT_WIZARD_TP_OTHER: Choose  "Other ", if you are not sure which one to choose.  "Other " will apply the hardest policy rules, as the distribution model is unclear. In this context only approved permissive licenses are allowed, all others are denied.
TT_WIZARD_ARCH_FRONTEND_OR_CLIENT: Choose  "Frontend or Client " if your software runs on client devices like personal computers, laptops, smartphones or tablets. This includes also web-based frontends running on browsers on these devices. Popular examples are websites, web-based applications, command line interface clients, mobile apps made available in app stores, thin clients and rich clients.
TT_WIZARD_ARCH_BACKEND: Choose  "Backend " for software running only on a backend server. This includes both software running on-premise and off-premise in the cloud.
TT_WIZARD_ARCH_VEHICLE_ONBOARD: Choose  "Product Onboard " for software, apps and dynamic contents which are used inside the product.
TT_WIZARD_ARCH_VEHICLE_OFFBOARD: Choose  "Product Offboard " for backend systems which are connected to the product.
TT_WIZARD_TU_LEGAL_ENTITY_INTERNAL: Choose  "Legal Entity Internal " if the target users are solely from one and the same Legal Entity.
TT_WIZARD_TU_MERCEDES_BENZ_GROUP: Choose  "Company Group " if the target users belong to more than your own legal entity, but all target users are still inside the company Group. This is for example the case when company AG provides an application which is used within the whole company Group.
TT_WIZARD_TU_EXTERNAL: Choose  "External " if the target users are external users outside of any company Legal Entity. This option includes software used by end customers, independent retailers, suppliers etc.
TT_WIZARD_DT_LEGAL_ENTITY_INTERNAL: Choose  "Legal Entity Internal " as distribution target if your backend software is only deployed within your own legal entity, without distribution of code or binaries to other legal entities. If you have chosen  "Frontend or Client " in the architecture, then it is automatically assumed that the Target Users equals the Distribution Target.
TT_WIZARD_DT_MERCEDES_BENZ_GROUP_OR_EXTE: Choose  "Company Group or External " as distribution target if your backend software is distributed beyond your own legal entity. This includes deployments or distribution of code within the company Group, or even beyond to external companies like suppliers or partners. If you have chosen  "Frontend or Client " in the architecture, then it is automatically assumed that the Target Users equals the Distribution Target.
SR_CONTAINS_NON_LATIN_LETTERS_DESCRIPTIO: The Package URL contains one or more non-Latin characters. It is recommended to check this package to prevent potential supply chain dependency attacks, for example combo-squatting.
USER_IN_PENDING_APPROVAL: The User is involved in a pending approval or/and review request.
SBOM_MAX_PURL_SIZE: One or more PURL entries exceed the maximum length.
SBOM_MAX_COPYRIGHT_TEXT_SIZE: One or more copyright texts exceed the maximum length.
SBOM_MAX_LICENSES_PER_COMPONENT: One or more components exceed the maximum number of licenses per component.
SBOM_MAX_COMPONENTS: SBOM exceeds the maximum number of components.
ERROR_IN_USE_ON_UPDATE_KEY: Can not be changed, it is in use.
ERROR_DESCRIPTION_MAINTENANCE: We are currently restarting our server to provide you with an even better experience. Please try again in 3 minutes. Thank you for your patience!
TT_COPY_TOKEN_DIALOG_CONTENT_TO_CLIPBOAR: copy token information from dialog to clipboard
FILL_SETTINGS_PART_1: Please complete the mandatory fields in the
TAD_COMMENT_EXCEEDS_MAX_LENGTH: Reasoning and comments must not exceed 1000 characters
TT_GENERATE_FOSS_DD_PARENT: Generating foss disclosure documents is only possible on projects without parents
TT_GENERATE_FOSS_DD_RESPONSIBLE_ONLY: Only the project responsible is allowed to generate foss disclosure documents
DLG_CONFIRMATION_UNRECOVERABLE_SPDX_DELE: Are you sure, you want to delete the SBOM "{name}"? This is an unrecoverable action.
SPDX_IN_USE_MESSAGE_KEY: The SBOM was either subject to an approval or review or is locked and can therefore not be deleted
SBOM_DELIVERIES_DISCLAIMER_TEXT: In this view the past SBOM deliveries are listed. The SBOMs which were subject to an approval or review will be retained. Furthermore, the five most recently delivered SBOMs will be kept. You can manually lock an SBOM to exclude it from automated deletion. The deletion of limit-reached, unlocked SBOMs will be triggered through a successful SBOM upload to the project channel (also known as version).
SOURCE_CODE_DISCLAIMER_TEXT: The complete corresponding source code of all used open source components, including transitive dependencies, shall be provided in version control systems. This source code is needed to fulfil our obligations to provide, but also to be able to modify and (re-)build the code in future ourselves. The FOSS Disclosure Portal just manages the reference to that source code. You can register this reference in form of a URL.
WIZARD_developer_target_description: Settings where the application is being developed
TT_WIZARD_TD_IN_HOUSE_DEVELOPMENT: Choose "In-house" if your software is developed by a development team within your own legal entity.
TT_WIZARD_TD_INTERNAL_DEVELOPMENT: Choose "Internal Supplier" if your software is developed by a development team outside of your own legal entity, which is part of the company Group.
TT_WIZARD_TD_EXTERNAL_DEVELOPMENT: Choose "External Supplier" if your software is developed by a development team from a company, which is not part of the company Group.
WIZARD_developer_target_inhouse_descript: The product is developed by a development team within the owner's legal entity
WIZARD_developer_target_internal_descrip: The product is developed by a development team from another legal entity of company
WIZARD_developer_target_external_descrip: The product is developed by a company outside of company Group
CHILD_PROJECT_UNDER_APPROVE: The Project is used in approval or/and review request of the Group.
HELP_TT_ALLOW: "Allowed" means, that the reviewed license is allowed for this use case.
HELP_TT_WARN: "Warned" means that the license of a component is on a deny list requiring investigation and a conscious decision.
HELP_TT_DENY: "Denied" is not to be approved in general, therefore the component should be removed or replaced by the development team.
HELP_TT_UNASSERTED: "Unasserted" means license information for the component is missing or it is unknown in the internal knowledge base.
LOGIN_ERROR_MESSAGE: Login error has been occurred, please try again later
PS_CHART_HELP: [Here you can insert the policy status help message...]
LF_CHART_HELP: [Here you can insert the license family help message...]
SR_CHART_HELP: [Here you can insert the scan remark help message...]
LR_CHART_HELP: [Here you can insert the license remark help message...]
RR_CHART_HELP: [Here you can insert the review remark help message...]
INFO_TEXT_ETERNAL: Please mark this checkbox if your project is developed by an external supplier company
SBOM_IS_OUTDATED: SBOM is older than 30 days and might be outdated
TT_UNASSERTED: "Unasserted" means license information for the component is missing or it is unknown in the internal knowledge base; such cases have to be resolved.
TT_DENIED: "Denied" is not to be approved in general, therefore the component should be removed or replaced by the development team.
TT_WARNED: "Warned" means that the license of a component is on a deny list requiring investigation and a conscious decision.
TT_NON_CHART: Only licenses with status "License Chart" have been legally reviewed and are generally allowable, but applicable policies such as allow & deny lists have to be considered
TT_MISSING_COPYRIGHT: Copyright information is missing; the warn level varies depending on the risk level of distribution. It is required to ascertain and provide this information in an updated SBOM delivery. Copyright information can typically be found on the license text of a component, within the project’s readme file, or written as code header in the main source code files.
TT_MALFORMED_COPYRIGHTS: Copyright information contains special or unexpected characters. It is recommended to check this specific copyright information. In case it is malformed please check with the development team to correct this information and provide it in an updated SBOM delivery.
SBOM_SUBSCRIPTION_TEXT: Mail notification when a new SBOM is uploaded
OVERALL_REVIEW_SUBSCRIPTION_TEXT: Mail notification when Status Review status is updated
ADD_MULTI_USERS_ERROR_ADD_PROJECT_USER: User is not authorized to add user for this project
ADD_MULTI_USERS_OWNER_USERS_ONLY: Only owner users can be flagged as project responsibles
RA_DIALOG_OFFER_ID_REQUIRED: Please assign an Offer ID in the Settings Dialog in Developer Tab first
HOME_EXPLAIN_NEW_PROJECT: A Project is a piece of custom developed software with a specific distribution scope, for example a backend distributed to business partners. Depending on the specific project characteristics, different policy rules and settings will apply, for example regarding FOSS disclosure document and approvals.
HOME_EXPLAIN_NEW_GROUP: A Project Group includes children projects, which inherit a group’s access tokens and other properties, like the owner and developer organization as well as approvals. Do not mix projects by different suppliers in one group. Also do not mix non-product projects with product projects in a group.
LABEL_CHECKBOX_TERMS_OF_USE_HINT: Please read the Terms of Use before agreeing
LICENSE_RULE_VERIFICATION_NOTE_TEXT: I have ensured that the license expression has been verified in the component’s source code as a multi license choice (OR). Furthermore, the compatibility of licenses has been manually checked and is ensured in case of a distribution.
INVALID_PROJECT_SETTINGS: please fill the data in all tabs
DLG_CONFIRMATION_DESCRIPTION_CANCEL_LICE: Are you sure, you want to cancel this license decision: "{decision}" for "{name}"?
TT_CHOICE_DENIED_RESP: only project responsible allowed to create a license decision
TT_CHOICE_DENIED_MASSIVE: The license decision function has been deactivated for this component, as it's license expression is considered inplausible, as it is containing more than 4 licenses to choose from. Please get in contact with your software supplier or FOSS Office for correction of input data.
ACTIVE_LICENSE_RULE_EXISTS: For the Component an active License Decision exists already
LICENSE_RULE_APPLIED_LATER_INFO: License decision will be applied to future SBOM Deliveries
DLG_DEPRECATION_CONFIRMATION_DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to mark the following project as DEPRECATED:
DLG_PR_DEPRECATION_CONFIRMATION_DESCRIPT: Are you sure you want to mark the following policy rule as DEPRECATED:
ERROR_PROJECT_HAS_ACTIVE_APPROVALS_OR_RE: Cannot deprecate project while it has active approvals or reviews
LicenseTextSearchDialogHelperText: This feature allows you to input a license text and find textually similar license entries in our database. By using a string distance function, the system measures the similarity between your input and existing entries. The search results are sorted based on their similarity to help you quickly identify the most relevant Matches.
BOTH_OR_NONE_OWNER_APPROVERS_ALLOWED_ERR: Both or none owner approvers are allowed
DENIED_OR_UNASSARETED_MESSAGE: FOSS Disclosure Document Generation disabled for Product projects containing denied or unasserted components. Please resolve accordingly.
ENTERPRISE_MOBILE_OTHER_MESSAGE: This FOSS Disclosure contains components that are denied or unasserted and are in violation. Please resolve accordingly before generating the FOSS Disclosure Document.
PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least 8 characters
PASSWORD_UPPERCASE: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
PASSWORD_LOWERCASE: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
PASSWORD_NUMBER: Password must contain at least one number
USERNAME_MIN_LENGTH: Username must be at least 3 characters
HINT_LINK_TEMPLATE: Use "$VALUE$" as a placeholder for the value in the jumplink
BOTH_OR_NONE_CHANNEL_AND_SBOM_ALLOWED_ER: Both parameters Channel and SBOM are required, or none of them
SBOM_UPLOAD_DISABLED: Create and select a channel to enable SBOM upload
PLACEHOLDER_NOTICE_CONTACT_ADDRESS:
Sample Ltd.
Sample Street 123 
12345 Sample City 
Germany 
and / or Mail Address
NOTICE_CONTACT_ADDRESS_TAB_HINT: This address is also visible in the Third Party Notices tab.
NOTICE_CONTACT_ADDRESS_INFO: This address is required to be provided in external distributions to ensure that recipients of the software have a point of contact for any questions or requests related to the Third Party Notices or the open source software used.
TT_BTN_EDIT_3RD_ADDRESS: edit the contact adress listed in 3rd party notice
DLG_CONFIRMATION_DESCRIPTION_DUMMY: Are you sure, you want to delete DUMMY project
HOME_EXPLAIN_NEW_DUMMY_PROJECT: Create a limited test project to experience the system.
DELETE_PROJECT: User is not authorized to delete this project
ERROR_IN_USE: Can not be deleted, item is in use
TT_not_delete_project_has_children: Project cannot be deleted as it has children
TT_not_delete_project_has_Approval: Project cannot be deleted as it is under approval
TT_not_delete_project_has_SBOM_retained: Project cannot be deleted as it has retained SBOM
TT_not_project_user_right: Project cannot be deleted as the user does not have sufficient rights.
TITLE: Title
LICENSE_NAME_VALIDATION_MIN_LENGTH: License name must be at least {min} characters long.
LICENSE_NAME_VALIDATION_MAX_LENGTH: License name must be at most {max} characters long.
FOSSDD_VERSION_TOOLTIP: Controls the form of the Disclosure Document.
EXT_LINK_DIALOG_TEXT: You are leaving Disclosure Portal. Do you want to continue?
DRAG_DROP_IMAGE: Drag and drop an image here or click to select
FEATURE_FLAGS_DESCRIPTION: Manage feature flags for local client and other experimental features. Changes take effect immediately.
FEATURE_FLAGS_SESSION_INFO: Changes are stored in your browser session only and will reset when you close the browser. These toggles are for debugging purposes only.
CONFIRMATION_MISSING: One or more SBOM have not been confirmed by FOSS Office. Please create a FOSS Office RD Request accordingly to proceed.
TT_POLICY_DECISION_DENIED_NOT_RESPONSIBL: only project responsible allowed to create a policy rule decision
TT_POLICY_DECISION_DENIED_NOT_FOSS_OFFIC: only FOSS Office allowed to create a policy rule decision for vehicle project
TT_DECISION_DENIED_COMPONENT_VERSION_NOT: version of the component is missing
TT_POLICY_DECISION_DENIED_FORBIDDEN_LICE: not allowed for license evaluated as forbidden
WARNED_POLICY_DECISION_VERIFICATION_NOTE: I confirm that I have investigated the risks for this specific project, considered mitigation measures, and made a conscious decision regarding this license.
DENIED_POLICY_DECISION_VERIFICATION_NOTE: I have ensured that the official clearing process has been adhered to in order to proceed. The clearing decision is officially documented and archived for future reference.
TOKEN_INFO_WARN_HINT: The project token has to be treated confidentially and may only be transmitted via encrypted communication channels. For security reasons, do not transmit the project UUID in the same message as the project token.
PROJECT_HAS_DENIED_DECISIONS: This project contains one or more denied components.
PROJECT_HAS_DENIED_DECISIONS_TO_BE_CANCE: This project contains one or more denied components.
LICENSE_RECOMMENDED_MSG: License "{license}" is recommended based on our automated analysis as it has fewer restrictions.
DENIED_LICENSES_MSG: There is no acceptable license option listed for this component. Please investigate if further licensing options are available or replace the component.
EQUAL_WEIGHT_LICENSES_MSG: No recommendation is possible because the license evaluation is equal.
UNASSERTED_LICENSES_MSG: The license "{license}" has an unasserted status and has not been included in this comparison. Please investigate the license information and update the SBOM if you want to consider it.
ADMIN_I18N_SECTION_SUBTITLE: Available languages currently configured in the portal.
ADMIN_I18N_DETAIL_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Browse all translation keys and values for the selected locale.
ADMIN_I18N_ADD_TO_ALL_LOCALES: Add this key to all locales
ADMIN_I18N_IMPORT_RESULT_ERROR_TITLE: Import blocked. Please fix the issues first.
PERSONAL_TOKEN_SECURITY_WARNING: This token will only be shown once. Please copy and store it securely.
CONFIRM_EXPIRE_PERSONAL_TOKEN_DESCRIPTIO: Are you sure you want to expire this token? The token will not be valid anymore.
